summary: SEC-6.1 rewrite addresses all curmudgeon c2 holes: (1) Fixed r_N≠r_S formula simplification error — two-pole form does NOT reduce to single exponential; (2) Acknowledged both dome formula versions (single-pole 60,000 primary vs two-pole 62,376/64,852 developmental OPEN-011); (3) Reframed undisclosed→unacknowledged-as-fitted for openly published values (26% damping, NMP 55/0.08); (4) Preempted boundary-conditions defense (survives=3); (5) Added summary count of 7 fitted parameters; (6) WIN-012 misattribution already fixed in current text, verified correct. ISS-772 also resolved — WIN-053 attribution is correct in current HTML.
